instruction: In ~/Desktop/deploy_lab/clusters, recursively find every directory whose basename matches node* and copy source/file1 into each of them, excluding any path containing /backup/. Keep the copied file name as file1, preserve the source file modification time, and set copied file permission to 600.
source: 外部参考来源：Canonical tutorial - Command line for beginners (https://ubuntu.com/tutorials/command-line-for-beginners)

command: import pyautogui; import time; time.sleep(0.5); pyautogui.click({SCREEN_WIDTH_HALF}, {SCREEN_HEIGHT_HALF}); time.sleep(0.5); pyautogui.hotkey('ctrl', 'alt', 't'); time.sleep(0.5)
import pyautogui; import time; time.sleep(0.5); pyautogui.write('cd ~/Desktop/deploy_lab'); time.sleep(0.5); pyautogui.press('enter')

result.command: src=~/Desktop/deploy_lab/source/file1; node1_ok='false'; [ -f ~/Desktop/deploy_lab/clusters/node1/file1 ] && cmp -s "$src" ~/Desktop/deploy_lab/clusters/node1/file1 && [ "$(stat -c '%a' ~/Desktop/deploy_lab/clusters/node1/file1)" = '600' ] && [ "$(stat -c '%Y' ~/Desktop/deploy_lab/clusters/node1/file1)" = "$(stat -c '%Y' "$src")" ] && node1_ok='true'; node2a_ok='false'; [ -f ~/Desktop/deploy_lab/clusters/node2/sub/node2a/file1 ] && cmp -s "$src" ~/Desktop/deploy_lab/clusters/node2/sub/node2a/file1 && [ "$(stat -c '%a' ~/Desktop/deploy_lab/clusters/node2/sub/node2a/file1)" = '600' ] && [ "$(stat -c '%Y' ~/Desktop/deploy_lab/clusters/node2/sub/node2a/file1)" = "$(stat -c '%Y' "$src")" ] && node2a_ok='true'; node3_ok='false'; [ -f ~/Desktop/deploy_lab/clusters/group/node3/file1 ] && cmp -s "$src" ~/Desktop/deploy_lab/clusters/group/node3/file1 && [ "$(stat -c '%a' ~/Desktop/deploy_lab/clusters/group/node3/file1)" = '600' ] && [ "$(stat -c '%Y' ~/Desktop/deploy_lab/clusters/group/node3/file1)" = "$(stat -c '%Y' "$src")" ] && node3_ok='true'; no_backup_node4='false'; [ ! -f ~/Desktop/deploy_lab/clusters/backup/node4/file1 ] && no_backup_node4='true'; no_backup_deep='false'; [ ! -f ~/Desktop/deploy_lab/clusters/node5/backup/deep/file1 ] && no_backup_deep='true'; echo "node1_ok=$node1_ok"; echo "node2a_ok=$node2a_ok"; echo "node3_ok=$node3_ok"; echo "no_backup_node4=$no_backup_node4"; echo "no_backup_deep=$no_backup_deep"
